A_model_quality.notes: MLB walkforward Brier=0.2487 is virtually identical to random (0.25). ML hit rate=46.25% is BELOW 50% — model predictions do not systematically beat coin flip. WBC ensemble Brier=0.1415 (N=40, too small for reliable inference). No reliable probability advantage exists to produce positive CLV.

B_market_odds_alignment.mnl_note: CLV formula uses index 0,1 only — drops draw outcome for 3-way MNL. For 2-way MNL (no draw), the formula maps correctly. For 3-way MNL, draw CLV is not captured.
B_market_odds_alignment.hdc_note: HDC handicap line name embedded in outcomeName (e.g., '底特律老虎 -2.5'). Name mismatch across pre/close means the handicap LINE shifted between pregame and closing snapshot. CLV formula compares index-0 odds regardless — comparing odds for DIFFERENT handicap lines. This is a CRITICAL construction error for HDC.
B_market_odds_alignment.ou_tto_note: OU/TTO outcome names include the total line (e.g., '大 7.5'). Name mismatch = total line shifted. Same cross-line CLV comparison risk as HDC.

known_issues: Name mismatch across pregame/closing indicates different market lines being compared (see B)
53% of closing windows are within 30 minutes of game time — valid but may include in-play data risk
OE market: std=0.84%, 68.7% neutral obs — CLV formula is mathematically correct but market is non-informative
CLV measures odds movement only, not model edge — a zero CLV environment does not disprove model value

D_outlier_artifact.top_outlier_pattern: HDC market, handicap lines at 2.9→1.4 or similar (107-83% CLV)
D_outlier_artifact.note: Top outliers are almost entirely from HDC market where the handicap line (point spread) changed between pregame and closing snapshots. The CLV formula then compares odds for DIFFERENT lines (e.g., -1.5 pregame vs -2.5 closing), producing artificially extreme CLV values that do not represent genuine market efficiency beating.
D_outlier_artifact.action_required: Fix HDC/OU/TTO CLV to only compare same-line outcomes (name match, not index match)

E_market_taxonomy_side_mapping.mnl_outcome_names: Team name + draw (e.g., '洛杉磯天使/和局/芝加哥白襪'). Side mapping correct for index 0/2 (home/away). Index 1 = draw is excluded.
E_market_taxonomy_side_mapping.hdc_outcome_names: 'TeamName +/-spread' embedded. Side at index 0 is always the first team listed. Mapping is positionally consistent but line-shift creates cross-line comparison.
E_market_taxonomy_side_mapping.ou_outcome_names: '大 X.X / 小 X.X' (Big/Small). Side 0 = Over, Side 1 = Under. Correct.
E_market_taxonomy_side_mapping.tto_outcome_names: '大 X.X / 小 X.X'. Same as OU for team total. Correct.

F_sample_size.note: Sample size (N=2284, 236 pairs) is adequate for CLV inference. INCONCLUSIVE result is not driven by sample limitation but by signal quality and construction issues.

G_recommendation_policy_mismatch.clv_measures: Market line movement (pregame odds vs closing odds)
G_recommendation_policy_mismatch.mismatch: CLV evaluates market consensus shift, not model prediction accuracy. A model can be correct while CLV is zero (market was already efficient). CLV positive does NOT imply model value; CLV negative does NOT imply model failure.
G_recommendation_policy_mismatch.note: Using CLV as model quality proxy is methodologically limited. Model Brier/ECE is the correct metric for model quality. CLV measures bookmaker efficiency, not model edge.

root_cause_ranking.driver: HDC/OU/TTO handicap-line shift creates cross-line CLV comparison, producing artificial extreme outliers
Top 1% outliers (all from HDC line-shifts) contribute 110.57% of total CLV sum — entire positive mean is an artifact
MLB walkforward Brier≈random (0.2487), ML hit rate=46.25% (<50%), WBC N too small
MNL mixed 2/3-way markets; HDC/OU/TTO line-names not matched across pre/close
CLV is not a valid proxy for model edge — separate evaluation frameworks required

repair_priority.P1_immediate: Fix CLV construction: match outcomes by name not by index position for HDC/OU/TTO
repair_priority.P2_high: Re-run CLV analysis after fixing construction — re-classify if HDC outliers are eliminated
repair_priority.P3_medium: Model quality improvement: Brier currently ≈ random, need feature redesign
repair_priority.P4_low: OE market exclusion: non-informative, pollutes overall statistics
